summary: Full-stack & AI engineer skilled in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Python. EC Engineering graduate (CGPA 8.0), LDCE Ahmedabad. Shipped 15+ deployed projects: multi-tenant SaaS with Supabase RLS, LLM agents on Groq/Gemini, FastAPI automation pipelines, and GSAP-driven interfaces. Open to remote full-stack or AI-engineering roles.

projects.name: WhatsApp AI Agent — Multi-Tenant SaaS
projects.description: Multi-tenant WhatsApp Business AI SaaS: an admin dashboard lets each business workspace configure an LLM-powered agent that handles customer conversations over the real WhatsApp Business Cloud API, with automated drip-sequence follow-ups and an appointment/reservation booking state machine.
bullets: Built a multi-tenant WhatsApp Business AI SaaS (Next.js 16, Supabase, Groq) letting businesses deploy an LLM agent over their real WhatsApp number, with per-tenant RLS-enforced data isolation
Designed a booking state machine and drip-sequence engine for automated appointment scheduling and follow-up messaging
Wrote integration tests that queried the live database directly to verify tenant isolation, catching and fixing a real cross-tenant RLS misconfiguration

projects.name: Job Search Automation Platform
projects.description: Self-built, fully deployed multi-agent job-search system: scrapes 12 job sources concurrently, scores every listing against a candidate profile via LLM + keyword heuristics, generates tailored ATS-friendly PDF CVs and cover letters per job, tracks the full application pipeline, and includes an AI-driven mock interview trainer with scored feedback.
bullets: Built and deployed a multi-agent job-search platform (FastAPI on Render, Next.js on Vercel, Supabase Postgres) that scrapes 12 job boards, scores listings via a hybrid keyword+LLM pipeline, and auto-generates tailored PDF CVs per application
Designed a provider-agnostic AI abstraction supporting both a cloud LLM API and a local CLI-based model, with automatic fail-open fallback and rate-limit-aware model cascading
Implemented an AI mock-interview trainer with scored, topic-based feedback sessions

projects.name: Zing Bliss Events — Luxury Event Agency Platform
projects.description: A high-end event-management agency platform: public routes (home, about, services, gallery, per-event case studies, contact) plus an interactive AI-style client-preference quiz, a private authenticated client portal with live event itineraries, and an admin dashboard/CMS for creating and managing events.
bullets: Built a full event-management agency platform (Next.js 16, GSAP, Lenis) with public marketing routes, an interactive client-preference quiz, a private client portal, and an admin CMS for event management
Implemented a GSAP/Lenis-driven cinematic animation system across an atomic-design component architecture
Designed and shipped an authenticated client portal separate from the public site for live event itinerary tracking

projects.name: Outreach Automation — Freelance Client Acquisition System
projects.description: Freelance client-acquisition automation: an Airtable-backed lead database drives 4 n8n workflows (daily outreach send, automated follow-up, inbound reply detection, Apollo.io lead import) surfaced through a Next.js analytics dashboard.
bullets: Designed a freelance-lead-generation automation system combining Airtable, n8n workflow automation, and Apollo.io lead sourcing
Built a Next.js analytics dashboard visualizing outreach funnel performance (sent, followed-up, replied) via Recharts

projects.name: Gym Tracker — Workout Analytics & Progressive-Overload Coach
projects.description: A full-stack fitness tracker: workout logging, routine builder, a per-exercise analytics view charting historical performance via Recharts, and an algorithmic progressive-overload coach that suggests the next workout's weights/reps based on logged history. Auth via NextAuth with a MongoDB adapter (GitHub OAuth).
bullets: Built a full-stack workout tracker (Next.js, MongoDB, NextAuth) with multi-user auth via GitHub OAuth
Designed an algorithmic progressive-overload coach that analyzes logged workout history to suggest next-session weights/reps
Implemented per-exercise historical analytics dashboards using Recharts

projects.name: Stock Trading Demo App
projects.description: A stock/trading demo application with authenticated and public route groups, background job processing via Inngest (for scheduled/async tasks like email notifications), and a Radix UI component system.
bullets: Built a stock-trading demo app (Next.js 15, MongoDB) with background job processing via Inngest for async/scheduled tasks
Implemented authentication with better-auth and accessible form UI with Radix UI + react-hook-form
Integrated transactional email (Nodemailer) triggered from background jobs

projects.name: Inventory Manager — Lot-Based Stock Ledger
projects.description: A batch/lot-based inventory management system with products, vendors, and customers CRUD, buy/sell transaction ledgers, weighted-average cost calculation across lots, and a soft-delete trash bin.
bullets: Built a lot-based inventory management system (Next.js, MongoDB) with weighted-average cost tracking across purchase batches
Implemented transaction-safety validation logic (date-ordering checks) to prevent inconsistent stock ledger states
Designed products/vendors/customers CRUD with a soft-delete trash pattern instead of destructive deletes

projects.name: IoT Weather Dashboard (Frontend + Backend)
projects.description: Live dashboard visualizing real-time sensor readings (temperature/humidity/weather data) streamed from a physical IoT device, paired with a genuine Express/MongoDB backend ingesting live sensor data.
bullets: Built a live IoT sensor dashboard in React consuming real-time weather/environmental data from a physical device's backend API
Built an Express/MongoDB REST API to ingest and serve real-time sensor readings from a physical IoT device

projects.name: Sweet Shop Management System (TDD Kata)
projects.description: A test-driven-development kata: a sweet-shop inventory CRUD app (add/search/filter sweets by name, category, price) built against a mocked REST API, with component-level Jest + React Testing Library coverage on every major component.
bullets: Completed a TDD kata building a sweet-shop inventory CRUD app (React, Vite) with full Jest + React Testing Library component coverage

projects.name: DevEvents — Event Discovery Platform
projects.description: A dynamic event discovery platform with server-side rendering and external REST API integration for real-time event data.
bullets: Built a dynamic event discovery platform (Next.js, TypeScript) with SSR and real-time external API integration

projects.name: Landing Page & UI Clone Gallery (36 projects)
projects.description: 36 pixel-perfect landing-page and UI clones spanning travel, astrology, legal, dental, hospitality, SaaS, and wedding verticals — 32 of 36 deployed live on Vercel.
bullets: Designed and deployed 36 pixel-perfect landing-page/UI clones across travel, legal, hospitality, astrology, and SaaS verticals — 32 live on Vercel
Demonstrates rapid, repeatable delivery: pixel-accurate implementation, GSAP/Framer Motion animation, and responsive layout across dozens of unrelated design systems

achievements: Solved 58+ problems on LeetCode with 82.4% acceptance rate (beats 66% of users globally)
Implemented key DS&A concepts: Recursion, BST, Arrays, Sorting — Easy (34) and Medium (24) level problems
CSS Battle: Solved precision CSS design challenges under time pressure
Chess64: Competed in strategic chess matches at college level
